GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,0,1/2)  S:(0,1/2,1/2)  T:(1/2,-1/2,1)  TA:(1/2,1/2,1)  W:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1,1,1)
GM:(0,0,0)  V:(1/2,1/2,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  M:(0,1,1/2)  A:(0,0,1/2)  U:(0,3/2,1/2)  Y:(0,1,0)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4  GM6  GM3  GM5  (R)V1-V1+  (R)V2V3  (S)L1-L1+  (S)L2L3  (T)M1+  (T)M1-  (T)M2+  (T)M2-  (T)M4  (T)M6  (T)M3  (T)M5  (TA)A1+  (TA)A1-  (TA)A2+  (TA)A2-  (TA)A4  (TA)A6  (TA)A3  (TA)A5  (W)U1U1  (W)U2U2  (W)U4U4  (W)U3U3  (X)Y1+  (X)Y1-  (X)Y2+  (X)Y2-  (X)Y4  (X)Y6  (X)Y3  (X)Y5
